name: Notification Skill
description: Listen to notifications and manage automatic replies based on user instructions.

toolDeclarations.name: configure_notification_auto_reply
toolDeclarations.description: Turn on notification auto-reply using the user's natural-language instructions. Use this when the user says things like 'auto reply when...', 'if John messages...', or 'reply to WhatsApp notifications with...'.

instructions.description: Exact user instruction describing which recent notifications to reply to and what response style/content to send.

toolDeclarations.name: show_notification_auto_reply
toolDeclarations.description: Show whether notification auto-reply is enabled and what instruction is active.

toolDeclarations.name: list_notifications
toolDeclarations.description: List active notifications that Idan can currently see.

packageName.description: Optional Android package filter, such as com.whatsapp.

toolDeclarations.name: open_notification
toolDeclarations.description: Open an active notification by id, app package, or text query.

query.description: Text to match in notification title, body, or package.

toolDeclarations.name: reply_to_latest_notification
toolDeclarations.description: Reply to the newest matching active notification that has an inline reply action.

packageName.description: Optional package filter, such as com.whatsapp.

query.description: Text to match in notification title/body.

toolDeclarations.name: open_notification_settings
toolDeclarations.description: Open Android notification listener settings so the user can grant notification access.
